name: environment_procurement_shortcut_millhaven_car_fair
premise: A pipeline pressure anomaly coincided with a landowner’s unauthorized valve work; liability is unclear and the line remains pressurized. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment procurement shortcut millhaven car fair has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Nadia Dubois
agents.identity: I am Nadia Dubois, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Mateo Ishikawa, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with fairness.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to fairness to preserve operational care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Nadia Dubois must choose under care versus fairness. What does Nadia Dubois do?
